id: Hard To Love ONE OK ROCK
folderName: Hard To Love ONE OK ROCK
setting: A former delinquent student visits his old teacher's classroom years after graduation to express his gratitude.
lyrics:
When I was just a kid
I couldn't wait till I grew up
Tried walking in your shoes
But I couldn't even tie them up
No matter how big and tall I grew
I was always looking up to you

You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
We've been down, we've been up
I hope I've made you proud enough
You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love

When I dropped out of school
You told me that my time was up
I was a rebel with a cause
Just didn't know what it was
So I waited, but jumped the barricade
You said you did the same thing at my age

You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
We've been down, we've been up
I hope I've made you proud enough
You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love

Sometimes I work a job that barely pays
Sometimes I'm barely making it through the day
But I'll be fine because I've got your blood in my veins
You taught me how to live and what it means to be brave

You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
We've been down, we've been up
I hope I've made you proud enough
You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love
Yeah, you make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love

lyricsJa.en: When I was just a kid
lyricsJa.ja: 僕がまだほんの子供だった頃

lyricsJa.en: I couldn't wait till I grew up
lyricsJa.ja: 早く大人になりたくて仕方なかった

lyricsJa.en: Tried walking in your shoes
lyricsJa.ja: あなたの靴を履いて歩こうとしたけど

lyricsJa.en: But I couldn't even tie them up
lyricsJa.ja: 靴紐を結ぶことすらできなかったね

lyricsJa.en: No matter how big and tall I grew
lyricsJa.ja: どれだけ僕が大きく背が伸びたとしても

lyricsJa.en: I was always looking up to you
lyricsJa.ja: いつだってあなたを見上げてばかりいた

lyricsJa.en: You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたは僕が「ただのダイヤの原石」なんだって教えてくれた

lyricsJa.en: You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
lyricsJa.ja: 今の僕という大人になれるように育ててくれた

lyricsJa.en: We've been down, we've been up
lyricsJa.ja: 落ち込んだ時期もあれば、上手くいった時期もあったけど

lyricsJa.en: I hope I've made you proud enough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたが少しでも僕を誇りに思ってくれていたらいいな

lyricsJa.en: You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love
lyricsJa.ja: 愛するのが難しいような（手のかかる）僕でさえ、あなたは事もなげに愛してくれた

lyricsJa.en: When I dropped out of school
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が学校を辞めた時

lyricsJa.en: You told me that my time was up
lyricsJa.ja: あなたは「もう時間切れだ」って言ったね

lyricsJa.en: I was a rebel with a cause
lyricsJa.ja: 信念を持って反抗していたつもりだった

lyricsJa.en: Just didn't know what it was
lyricsJa.ja: ただそれが何なのか分からなかっただけなんだ

lyricsJa.en: So I waited, but jumped the barricade
lyricsJa.ja: だから待ったけど、結局バリケードを飛び越えてしまった

lyricsJa.en: You said you did the same thing at my age
lyricsJa.ja: あなたも「お前と同じ歳の頃に同じことをしたよ」って言ってくれたね

lyricsJa.en: You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたは僕が「ただのダイヤの原石」なんだって教えてくれた

lyricsJa.en: You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
lyricsJa.ja: 今の僕という大人になれるように育ててくれた

lyricsJa.en: We've been down, we've been up
lyricsJa.ja: 落ち込んだ時期もあれば、上手くいった時期もあったけど

lyricsJa.en: I hope I've made you proud enough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたが少しでも僕を誇りに思ってくれていたらいいな

lyricsJa.en: You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love
lyricsJa.ja: 愛するのが難しいような僕でさえ、あなたは事もなげに愛してくれた

lyricsJa.en: Sometimes I work a job that barely pays
lyricsJa.ja: 時々、割に合わないような仕事をして

lyricsJa.en: Sometimes I'm barely making it through the day
lyricsJa.ja: その日を乗り切るだけで精一杯な時もある

lyricsJa.en: But I'll be fine because I've got your blood in my veins
lyricsJa.ja: でも大丈夫、僕の体にはあなたの血が流れているから

lyricsJa.en: You taught me how to live and what it means to be brave
lyricsJa.ja: あなたは僕に生き方と、勇敢であることの意味を教えてくれた

lyricsJa.en: You showed me that I was just a diamond in the rough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたは僕が「ただのダイヤの原石」なんだって教えてくれた

lyricsJa.en: You helped me to grow into the man that I've become
lyricsJa.ja: 今の僕という大人になれるように育ててくれた

lyricsJa.en: We've been down, we've been up
lyricsJa.ja: 落ち込んだ時期もあれば、上手くいった時期もあったけど

lyricsJa.en: I hope I've made you proud enough
lyricsJa.ja: あなたが少しでも僕を誇りに思ってくれていたらいいな

lyricsJa.en: You make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love
lyricsJa.ja: 愛するのが難しいような僕でさえ、あなたは事もなげに愛してくれた

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, you make it look easy, even when I'm hard to love
lyricsJa.ja: 本当に、愛しにくいような僕でさえ、あなたは難なく愛してくれた

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Henderson, it’s been a long time.
sentences.displayHtml: Henderson, it’s been a long time.

sentences.text: I wanted to stop by and finally thank you for not giving up on me.
sentences.displayHtml: I wanted to stop by and finally thank you for not giving up on me.

conversation.japanese: ヘンダーソン先生、ご無沙汰しています。どうしても一度伺って、先生が見捨てずにいてくれたことにお礼を言いたかったんです。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: No matter how much you’ve grown, I still see that rebel I used to know.
sentences.displayHtml: No matter how much you’ve grown, I still see that rebel I used to know.

conversation.japanese: レオじゃないか！立派になったな。どんなに成長しても、当時の反抗的だった君の面影があるよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Yeah, I was a real rebel with a cause back then, even though I didn’t know what I was fighting for.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah, I was a real rebel with a cause back then, even though I didn’t know what I was fighting for.

conversation.japanese: ええ、当時は何に対してかも分からず、ただ理由もなく反抗ばかりしていましたから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You were just a diamond in the rough.
sentences.displayHtml: You were just a diamond in the rough.

sentences.text: I always knew you’d grow into a fine man one day.
sentences.displayHtml: I always knew you’d grow into a fine man one day.

conversation.japanese: 君はただの磨けば光る原石だったんだ。いつか立派な大人になってくれると信じていたよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I know I was a handful.
sentences.displayHtml: I know I was a handful.

sentences.text: I really appreciate how you stayed by me, even when I was hard to love.
sentences.displayHtml: I really appreciate how you stayed by me, even when I was hard to love.

conversation.japanese: 手のかかる生徒でしたよね。あんなに扱いづらかった僕のそばに、ずっといてくれたことに本当に感謝しています。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: We definitely had our ups and downs, but seeing you today makes it all worth it.
sentences.displayHtml: We definitely had our ups and downs, but seeing you today makes it all worth it.

conversation.japanese: 確かにいろんなことがあったけれど、今の君の姿を見れば、すべて報われた気分だよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I hope I finally made you proud.
sentences.displayHtml: I hope I finally made you proud.

sentences.text: Your lessons are like the blood in my veins now; they're a part of everything I do.
sentences.displayHtml: Your lessons are like the blood in my veins now; they're a part of everything I do.

conversation.japanese: 少しは先生の誇りになれたでしょうか。先生の教えは今も僕の血肉となって、自分の一部になっています。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You’ve done more than enough, Leo.
sentences.displayHtml: You’ve done more than enough, Leo.

sentences.text: I'm just happy to see you’ve found your way.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm just happy to see you’ve found your way.

conversation.japanese: 十分すぎるほどだよ、レオ。君が自分の道を見つけられたことが、何より嬉しいんだ。
